# Q 

2 

M 

CLAYLUBE REDEFINED

## Exterior / Preparation

### Concentrated and ultra slick clay lubricant.

Q²M ClayLube REDEFINED is a neutral clay lubricant developed to work safely with all types of clay bars. It provides extreme slickness, allowing the clay to glide smoothly across the surface without grabbing or marring the paint, while remaining safe for even the most delicate clay types.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_clay-lube_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Concentrated and ultra-slick clay lubricant.

Q²M ClayLube REDEFINED reduces friction during the claying process and helps reveal a smooth surface without staining or damaging paintwork. Its concentrated formula allows dilution without compromising performance.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons70.svg)

SLICKNESS FOR SAFE DECONTAMINATION 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons25.svg)

HIGHLY CONCENTRATED 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons64.svg)

SUITABLE ON ALL SURFACES 

what makes

Q2M CLAYLUBE REDEFINED so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/claylube1-1024x576.jpg)

Extreme slickness to minimise marring during claying

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/claylube3-1024x576.jpg)

Safe for all clay bars, cloths and discs

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mclaylube.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML

SLICKNESS

EXTREME

PH LEVEL

NEUTRAL

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

CLAYLUBE REDEFINED

01
Dilute Q²M ClayLube REDEFINED as required or use neat. 

02
Spray generously onto the surface to be clayed. 

03
Glide the clay gently over the lubricated area. 

04
Keep the surface well lubricated at all times. 

05
Wipe off residue after claying is complete. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Is Q²M ClayLube REDEFINED safe for all paint types? 

Yes. It is neutral and safe for delicate surfaces.

02
Can it be diluted? 

Yes. It can be diluted up to 1:25.

03
Does it stain paint or trim? 

No. It does not stain surfaces.

04
Can it be used with any clay product? 

Yes. It works with clay bars, cloths and discs.

05
Is it suitable for professional use? 

Yes. It is suitable for enthusiasts and professionals.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000260538-Q-M-ClayLube)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
